input: What is the return policy for electronics?
retrieved_context: Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase for electronics. Items must be in original packaging with all accessories. A receipt is required. Opened software and digital downloads are non-refundable. Defective items can be exchanged within 90 days.
expected_output: Electronics can be returned within 30 days of purchase in original packaging with receipt. Opened software is non-refundable. Defective items can be exchanged within 90 days.

input: How do I apply for a business loan?
retrieved_context: To apply for a business loan, you need: 1) A completed application form, 2) Business plan, 3) Last 3 years of tax returns, 4) Financial statements, 5) Personal identification. Applications can be submitted online or at any branch. Processing takes 5-10 business days.
expected_output: To apply for a business loan, submit an application form along with your business plan, 3 years of tax returns, financial statements, and personal ID. Apply online or at a branch. Processing takes 5-10 business days.

input: What are the shipping options available?
retrieved_context: We offer three shipping options: 1) Standard Shipping (5-7 business days, free for orders over $50), 2) Express Shipping (2-3 business days, $12.99), 3) Overnight Shipping (next business day, $24.99). All orders include tracking. International shipping is available to 40+ countries.
expected_output: Three shipping options: Standard (5-7 days, free over $50), Express (2-3 days, $12.99), Overnight (next day, $24.99). All orders include tracking. International shipping available.

input: What programming languages does the API support?
retrieved_context: Our API provides official SDKs for Python (3.8+), JavaScript/Node.js (16+), Java (11+), Go (1.19+), and Ruby (3.0+). Community-maintained SDKs are available for PHP, C#, and Rust. REST endpoints can be called from any language that supports HTTP requests.
expected_output: Official SDKs available for Python 3.8+, JavaScript/Node.js 16+, Java 11+, Go 1.19+, and Ruby 3.0+. Community SDKs for PHP, C#, and Rust. Any language with HTTP support can use the REST API.

input: How do I reset my password?
retrieved_context: To reset your password: 1) Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, 2) Enter your registered email address, 3) Check your email for a reset link (valid for 24 hours), 4) Click the link and enter a new password (minimum 8 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character). If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support.
expected_output: Click 'Forgot Password', enter your email, and follow the reset link sent to your inbox (valid 24 hours). New password must be 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
